svg.title: Smart home watch app — user flow overview
svg.desc: Full user flow from watch face through app grid to all five apps: cmd center, devices, analytics, logic engine, and access ctrl

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the watch face')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the app grid')
sendPrompt('What is on the cmd center screen?')
sendPrompt('What is on the devices screen?')
sendPrompt('What is on the analytics screen?')
sendPrompt('What is on the logic engine screen?')
sendPrompt('What is on the access ctrl screen?')
